provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly interior concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, atmospheric directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi ship interior, visible surface texture and lived-in detail, visible brushstrokes, wide establishing view of room interior, no characters present, ship engine compartment with exposed reactor housing behind safety glass, charcoal grey walls with warning labels and radiation markers, maintenance catwalks with metal grating, tool station with regulation kit mounted on wall, diagnostic panels with status lights, the hum of machinery implied by slight vibration blur, pipes and conduits neatly bundled and labeled, warm from engine heat
